name: Base Ten
description: Place value, rounding, and multi-digit operations
objectives: Round numbers to any place value
Understand decimal place value for tenths, hundredths, and thousandths

ai.guidelines: Focus on place value to 1,000,000, rounding to any place, multi-digit addition/subtraction/multiplication, division with remainders, understanding place value relationships, and decimal place value (identifying digits in tenths/hundredths/thousandths places, understanding the value of decimal digits, writing decimals in expanded form, the 10x relationship between adjacent decimal places). Note: decimal place value is about understanding positions/values, not about converting fractions to decimals or decimal arithmetic (those belong to Fractions 4th)
